info.title: HackWebTools API
info.description: Backend API for HackWebTools - Cybersecurity Learning Platform

post.description:
Register a new user account

- Validates email format and password strength
- Sends verification email
- Returns user profile (without password)

Login with email and password

- Returns access token (30min) and refresh token (7 days)
- Sets refresh token in HTTP-only cookie
- Updates last login timestamp

Authenticate with Google OAuth

- Verifies Google ID token
- Creates user if doesn't exist
- Returns tokens

Refresh access token using refresh token

- Validates refresh token
- Returns new access token and refresh token

Verify user email with verification token

- Validates verification token
- Marks email as verified

Request password reset email

- Sends reset link to user's email
- Token expires in 1 hour

Reset password with reset token

- Validates reset token
- Updates user password
Logout user by clearing refresh token cookie

get.description: Get current user profile

Get comprehensive user statistics

Returns:
- Tools completed count
- Pages read count
- Quizzes attempted
- Challenges completed
- Total points
- Current streak
- Subscription tier
- Certificates earned

Get dashboard data for current user

Returns:
- User stats
- Progress overview
- Recent activity
- Subscription status

post.description:
Mark a documentation page as read

- Updates user's reading progress
- Updates streak if applicable

Mark a tool as completed

- Adds tool to completed list
- Awards points
- Updates streak

Record quiz score

- Saves quiz result
- Awards points based on score
- Updates streak

Mark challenge as completed

- Adds challenge to completed list
- Awards points
- Updates streak

get.description: Get current learning streak

Get user's learning history

Returns all completed items, quizzes, and challenges

Get public user profile (limited info)

Useful for leaderboards and community features

post.description:
Create a Stripe Checkout session for subscription

Steps:
1. Create Stripe customer if doesn't exist
2. Create checkout session
3. Return checkout URL
Create subscription directly (returns client secret for frontend payment)
Cancel current subscription
Update subscription to different tier

get.description: Get Stripe customer portal URL

post.description:
Handle Stripe webhook events

Events handled:
- checkout.session.completed
- customer.subscription.updated
- customer.subscription.deleted
- invoice.payment_succeeded
- invoice.payment_failed

get.description: Get current subscription status

Get all learning paths with user progress

Returns paths with:
- Path details
- User's progress (if logged in)
- Lock status based on prerequisites

schema.title: Response Get All Learning Paths Api V1 Learning Paths Get

get.description: Get specific learning path with details and user progress

post.description:
Enroll in a learning path

Requirements:
- User must be verified
- Path must not be locked (prerequisites must be met)

Mark a module as completed

Updates:
- Adds module to completed list
- Calculates new completion percentage
- Unlocks next module
- Awards certificate if path completed

get.description:
Get user's overall learning path statistics

Returns:
- Total paths available
- Enrolled paths count
- Completed paths count
- Total modules completed
- Total hours spent
Get detailed progress for all enrolled paths

Get learning paths filtered by level

Levels: beginner, intermediate, advanced

Get all available quiz categories

Returns list of categories like: nmap, sqli, xss, burp, metasploit

Generate a new quiz for a specific category

- **category**: Topic (nmap, sqli, xss, burp, metasploit)
- **difficulty**: Optional filter (easy, medium, hard)

Returns 10 random questions without correct answers

post.description:
Submit quiz answers and get results

- Grades the quiz
- Awards points based on score
- Updates user statistics
- Returns detailed review with explanations

get.description:
Get user's quiz statistics

Returns:
- Total quizzes taken
- Total passed (70%+)
- Average score
- Total points earned
- Best category
- Recent attempts

Get leaderboard for a specific category

Ranks by:
1. Highest score
2. Fastest time (tie-breaker)

Returns top performers

schema.title: Response Get Leaderboard Api V1 Quizzes Leaderboard  Category  Get

get.description:
Get practice questions with answers (not graded)

Useful for learning mode

Get all available practice labs with optional user progress

- **Public**: Returns all labs
- **Authenticated**: Includes user progress and enrollment status

Get specific lab details with user progress

- **lab_id**: Lab identifier (e.g., "sql-injection-basics")

post.description:
Start a lab (enroll)

- **Requires authentication**
- Creates progress tracking for the lab

Submit a challenge solution

- **submission**: Lab ID, challenge ID, and flag attempt
- **use_hint**: Request a hint if flag is incorrect
- **Requires authentication**

Returns:
- Success/failure status
- Points awarded
- Hint (if requested and available)
- Lab completion status

get.description:
Get user's overall lab statistics

- **Requires authentication**
- Returns total labs completed, points earned, favorite lab type, etc.

Get global lab leaderboard

- **Public endpoint**
- **limit**: Number of entries to return (default: 10, max: 100)

Returns top users by total points and labs completed

schema.title: Response Get Lab Leaderboard Api V1 Labs Leaderboard All Get

post.description:
Check if user is eligible for a certificate

- **Requires authentication**
- Returns requirements met and pending

Generate a certificate

- **Requires authentication**
- Checks eligibility before generation
- Returns certificate details and PDF download URL

get.description:
Verify a certificate by ID

- **Public endpoint**
- Returns certificate details if valid

Get all certificates for current user

- **Requires authentication**
- Returns list of all earned certificates

Download certificate as PDF

- **Requires authentication**
- Returns PDF file

Get global certificate statistics

- **Public endpoint**
- Returns stats about issued certificates

post.description:
Create a new Razorpay subscription

- **plan_type**: pro_monthly, pro_yearly, enterprise_monthly, enterprise_yearly, institutional
- **organization_name**: Required for institutional plans
- **seats**: Required for institutional plans (minimum 10)
- **affiliate_code**: Optional referral code

Verify Razorpay payment signature and process payment

- **razorpay_payment_id**: Payment ID from Razorpay
- **razorpay_order_id**: Order ID (for one-time payments)
- **razorpay_subscription_id**: Subscription ID (for subscription payments)
- **razorpay_signature**: Signature from Razorpay

get.description: Get current user's active subscription

post.description:
Cancel a subscription

- **cancel_at_cycle_end**: If true, subscription continues until end of billing cycle
- **reason**: Optional cancellation reason

get.description: Get subscription analytics (admin only)

post.description:
Handle Razorpay webhook events

Processes subscription.activated, subscription.charged, subscription.cancelled, etc.

get.description: Get Razorpay pricing plans

post.description:
Join the affiliate program

- Generates unique affiliate code (HACK-USERNAME-XXX)
- **20% commission** on all referrals (starter tier)
- Commission tiers: Starter (20%), Bronze (25%), Silver (30%), Gold (35%)
- Requires payment details for payouts

get.description: Get current user's affiliate account details

Get detailed affiliate statistics

Returns:
- Total clicks, referrals, conversions
- Revenue generated and commission earned
- Current tier and commission rate
- Progress to next tier
- Top traffic sources

Get affiliate's commission history

- **status**: Filter by pending, approved, paid, rejected
- **limit**: Maximum number of records (default: 50)
Get affiliate's payout history

Get top affiliates leaderboard (public)

Shows top performers by total revenue generated

post.description:
Track affiliate click (called when user visits with ?ref=CODE)

- Stores click with IP, user agent, referrer, UTM params
- Increments affiliate click count
Approve a pending commission (admin only)
Process payout for approved commissions (admin only)

get.description: Get all pending commissions for approval (admin only)

Search for CVEs using NVD API

- **keyword**: Search term (e.g., "apache", "linux kernel")
- **results_per_page**: Number of results (1-100)
- **start_index**: Pagination offset

Rate limit: 5 requests/30s without API key, 50 requests/30s with key

Get recently published CVEs

- **days**: Look back period (1-120 days)
- **results_per_page**: Number of results (1-100)

parameters.name: days

schema.description: Number of days to look back
schema.title: Days

parameters.description: Number of days to look back

get.description:
Perform DNS lookup

- **domain**: Domain name to query
- **record_type**: A, AAAA, MX, TXT, NS, CNAME

parameters.name: record_type

schema.description: Record type: A, AAAA, MX, TXT, NS, CNAME
schema.title: Record Type

parameters.description: Record type: A, AAAA, MX, TXT, NS, CNAME

get.description:
Search for exploits on GitHub

- **query**: CVE ID or exploit keyword
- **page**: Page number
- **limit**: Results per page (1-100)

post.description:
Scan HTTP security headers

Checks for: HSTS, CSP, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, etc.
Returns security score (0-100) and recommendations

get.description:
Check SSL/TLS certificate information

- **hostname**: Domain name (without protocol)
- **port**: Port number (default: 443)

post.description:
Check IP reputation using AbuseIPDB

Requires ABUSEIPDB_API_KEY environment variable
Free tier: 1000 checks/day

Check domain reputation using VirusTotal

Requires VIRUSTOTAL_API_KEY environment variable
Free tier: 4 requests/minute

get.description:
Enumerate subdomains using multiple free sources

- **domain**: Target domain (e.g., example.com)
- **sources**: crtsh, hackertarget, securitytrails (comma-separated)

Sources:
- crt.sh: Certificate Transparency Logs (always free)
- HackerTarget: Free API (limited)
- SecurityTrails: Requires API key (SECURITYTRAILS_API_KEY)

post.description:
Generate security assessment report

- **projectName**: Name of the security assessment project
- **findings**: List of security findings
- **executiveSummary**: Optional executive summary
- **scope**: Optional scope description

Generate PDF report (placeholder for future implementation)

Note: Implement with reportlab or weasyprint for actual PDF generation

Track analytics event

- **eventName**: Event type (page_view, user_signup, tool_usage, etc.)
- **userId**: Optional user ID
- **tier**: Optional user tier (free, pro, enterprise)
- **eventData**: Optional event metadata

get.description:
Get analytics summary with metrics

- **startDate**: Optional start date filter
- **endDate**: Optional end date filter

Get conversion funnel data

Returns visitor → signup → pricing → purchase flow

Get user activity timeline

- **userId**: User ID to get timeline for

Returns last 100 events for the user

Test all API connections

Returns summary of all API connection status
Test Gemini AI API connection
Test Shodan API connection
Test NVD API connection
Test GitHub API connection
Test AbuseIPDB API connection
Test VirusTotal API connection

post.description:
Use Gemini AI for analysis

- **prompt**: Text prompt for analysis
- **apiKey**: Optional Gemini API key

get.description:
Query Shodan search engine

- **query**: Search query (e.g., "apache", "port:22")
- **apiKey**: Optional Shodan API key
Root endpoint
Health check endpoint
